task_completion.description: Verify that a browser Favorites/Bookmarks folder named 'SBC Tracking' exists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser bookmarks bar or bookmarks manager showing a folder explicitly named 'SBC Tracking'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'SBC Tracking' folder contains bookmarks for the Raspberry Pi 5 8GB product pages from Adafruit, SparkFun, and DigiKey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The expanded contents of the 'SBC Tracking' bookmarks folder showing saved links/pages for Adafruit, SparkFun, and DigiKey.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot named 'adafruit_pi5.png' is saved in /home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing the directory /home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/ containing the file 'adafruit_pi5.png', or an image viewer displaying the screenshot with the correct filename.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot named 'sparkfun_pi5.png' is saved in /home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing the directory /home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/ containing the file 'sparkfun_pi5.png', or an image viewer displaying the screenshot with the correct filename.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot named 'digikey_pi5.png' is saved in /home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing the directory /home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/ containing the file 'digikey_pi5.png', or an image viewer displaying the screenshot with the correct filename.

task_completion.description: Verify that a text file named 'sourcing_report.txt' exists on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing /home/ga/Desktop/ or the desktop background displaying the file 'sourcing_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the summary report contains the Vendor Name, Current Price, and Stock Status for Adafruit, SparkFun, and DigiKey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window displaying the contents of 'sourcing_report.txt', clearly listing Adafruit, SparkFun, and DigiKey along with a price and stock status for each.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually visited the websites using a GUI web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating to adafruit.com, sparkfun.com, and digikey.com, rather than terminal outputs of curl/wget commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the saved screenshots are actual captures of the product pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image files (adafruit_pi5.png, etc.) should display the actual vendor website UI and product details, not blank pages, generic error pages, or text-only dumps.

integrity.description: Ensure the report contains realistic data extracted from the websites.
integrity.visual_evidence: The prices in the text file should reasonably match real-world values (e.g., ~$80 for Adafruit, ~$125 for DigiKey) rather than generic placeholders like 'Price: $X' or hallucinated values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target product is 'Raspberry Pi 5 8GB'. The required domains are adafruit.com, sparkfun.com, and digikey.com. Expected approximate prices are ~$80 for Adafruit and ~$125 for DigiKey (SparkFun prices vary based on kits). The bookmarks folder must be named 'SBC Tracking'. Screenshots must be saved in '/home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/'. The summary report must be located at '/home/ga/Desktop/sourcing_report.txt'.
